name: Blueberry Lemon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir the lemon juice into the milk. Let stand for 1 minute to sour.
2. Stir in the beaten egg, vegetable oil, and molasses.
3. In a large bowl, combine the bran, whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, packed brown sugar, grated lemon rind, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Add the milk mixture and blueberries, mixing just until combined.
5. Spoon the batter into non-stick or paper-lined muffin tins.
6. Bake in a 375 degree F (190 C) oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
Makes 12 muffins.
Per muffin: 159 calories, 6 grams total fat (1 gram saturated), 3 grams fiber.
